release_notes: `reconciliation.py` looked up a strategy's real/paper mode with a hardcoded `.py` extension, so spec-based (Composer) strategies always resolved to `paper` and had their parked long legs (held after `SHORT_CLOSED`) dropped from the comparison — the broker's genuinely open positions then showed up as false `orphan_broker` alerts. Daily loss limit check now normalizes the configured threshold's sign when read, instead of trusting whatever sign is stored in `config.json`. A stale/hand-edited positive value inverted the comparison so that any profit under the threshold counted as a breach — today a +26.1pt winning trade falsely disabled all real strategies for the rest of the day.
